name: Crockpot Black Beans & Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Smoked link sausage cut into 1- to 2-inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash beans and soak overnight in a bowl with water covering the beans.
2. Cook using a large crock pot.
3. Brown bulk sausage in a skillet, remove excess grease, and add other meats (pork, stew beef, ham).
4. Add bell pepper, onions, garlic, celery, and spices to the meat mixture. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Add beans soaked in water; if needed, add more water to cover ingredients by at least two inches.
6. Stir in four bouillon cubes and cover. Cook on high for three hours, then switch to low for six hours or longer.
7. Occasionally stir the pot, adding water if it becomes too thin. If necessary, mash half a cup of beans with a fork and stir back in as a thickener about an hour before serving.
8. Add vinegar just before serving.
9. Serve over rice (brown or white), garnished with fresh chopped onion.
Instructions are clear and numbered for easy following. Ingredients are listed with precise measurements for consistency.
